substrate.value: soda lime glass (SLG), magnesium-free fused silica (SiO₂), CIGS

processParameters.deliveryMethod: Effusion and thermobath for precursor delivery

otherAspects.safety: ALD-Zn1/C0xMgxO involves handling of volatile precursors like diethyl zinc and magnesium precursors; proper ventilation and safety protocols are required.
